dataset_title: The neural dynamics of working memory and transcranial magnetic stimulation
notes: OpenAlex resolves the DOI to work id W7167798138 (cited_by_count: 0, counts_by_year: []). The query works?filter=cites:W7167798138 returns 0 results, consistent with that zero count. A fallback Europe PMC search for the dataset accession "ds008037" also returns 0 hits. The dataset was only created/indexed on OpenNeuro on 2026-07-09, just 12 days before this analysis (2026-07-21), so no citing literature has had time to appear yet. This reflects publication recency (an unused/very new dataset), not a saturated research area -- 'low' saturation here means total absence of citing works rather than exhaustive-but-narrow use.
